name: Routing YAML
description: Routes each agent turn to a model picked by a declarative routing.yaml file. Classifies the turn (code, long-context, web research, compliance, copy, strategy, etc.), looks up the rule, and applies the override via before_model_resolve. Enforces quarantined-model approval, cost-cliff warnings, and regulated-client park-and-notify.

routingYamlPath.description: Absolute path to routing.yaml. Falls back to env ROUTING_YAML_PATH, then ~/.openclaw/workspace/routing.yaml, then graceful no-op.

callerTaskClass.description: Optional explicit task class override. When set, skips the heuristic classifier (used by Graphiti for ner_structured_extraction).

regulatedClientTag.description: Set true when this agent serves a regulated client (TGA/AHPRA/AFSL/etc.). Enables PARK_AND_NOTIFY behavior on primary outage.

extraRegulatedKeywords.description: Additional case-insensitive keywords that mark a prompt as compliance_review.

providerMap.description: Optional family-name -> provider id map (e.g. opus-4.7 -> anthropic). When unset, falls back to DEFAULT_PROVIDER_MAP for known Anthropic families.

modelMap.description: Optional family-name -> SDK model id map (e.g. opus-4.7 -> claude-opus-4-7). When unset, falls back to DEFAULT_MODEL_MAP for known Anthropic families. Per-fleet overrides take precedence so non-Anthropic providers (OpenAI, Google, Perplexity) can resolve their SDK strings.

notifyChannelOverride.description: Override the routing.yaml notify_channel for PARK_AND_NOTIFY events.
